name: First  Lutheran Church
description: Come play pickleball at First Lutheran Church in Sioux City, IA! There are 3 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Leif Erikson Park Tennis
description: Leif Erikson Park Tennis is a place to play pickleball in Sioux City, IA. There are 3 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Morningside Bible Church
description: Morningside Bible Church is a place to play pickleball in Sioux City, IA. There are 2 indoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. The courts are private. Players have access to lights.

name: Riverside Park
description: Riverside Park is a place to play pickleball in Sioux City, IA. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: River Valley Community School
description: Come play pickleball at River Valley Community School in Correctionville, IA! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Salix Park
description: Salix Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Salix, IA. There are 2 outdoor courts. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net.

name: Sergeant Bluff Community Center
description: Sergeant Bluff Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Sergeant Bluff, IA. There are 4 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Amenities include lights. A one-time fee is required to play.
